brand_identity.name: Bestpl.ai
brand_identity.aesthetics: Light Mode Gamer - Clean, Warm, High-Contrast, Reward-Centric

layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 py-2 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 transition-all duration-300 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-6 py-2 rounded-full border border-stone-200 transition-all duration-300 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-full transition-colors duration-200

cards.base: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.interactive: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer group
cards.glass: rounded-xl border border-white/20 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-sm

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200

gamification_mechanics.xp_display: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-bold text-primary
gamification_mechanics.leaderboard_row: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white rounded-lg border border-stone-100 hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
gamification_mechanics.badge: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
gamification_mechanics.upvote_button: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-stone-100 text-stone-400 hover:text-primary transition-colors active:scale-95

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on stone-50 backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Override the CSS variables in /app/frontend/src/index.css with the values from the 'colors.base' section of this JSON.
Use the 'gamification_mechanics' section to style the Points, Leaderboard, and Challenge components.
Implement a 'Light Gamer' aesthetic: use white cards with high-quality borders and shadows on a warm stone background (#FAFAF9).
Use 'Outfit' font for all headings to give a modern tech feel, and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for body text.
For the Training Section, display cards with thumbnail images and a progress bar overlay.
Ensure all buttons have the 'pill' shape (rounded-full) as defined in components.buttons.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use Bento grids and asymmetrical layouts where possible.
Every interaction must have a micro-interaction (hover lift, color shift, shadow expansion).
Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-900 (#18181B) or similar.
For the AI tools, use a clean, distraction-free interface with a focus on the content generation area.
